column10: Launch Day — record baseline before 10:00am UTC then track all-day
Week 2 Day 2 — Email 5 sends for May 30 sign-ups
Week 2 Day 7 — Email 5 coupon expires for May 30 sign-ups

column7: Tag: seed-saver. Products: Seed Saving Field Manual. Measure via Kit tag count vs Etsy orders from that cohort.
No specific tag — inferred from purchase of Zone Calendar or Zone Quick-Start Card.
Tag: city-grower. Products: Container Growing Blueprint. Measure via Kit tag count.
Tag: preservationist. Products: Harvest Preservation Handbook. Measure via Kit tag count.

column1: Gift Buyer (high AOV bundles or gift messaging)
column7: No tag — inferred from Etsy Favorites or multiple-item orders. Check Etsy order notes for "gift" language.
Subscribers who did not click any behavioral tag link. Receive full untagged newsletter.
Average repeat purchase rate across all cohorts

column4: Source: GA4 utm_source=instagram sessions that converted. Count Kit sign-ups with Instagram referral.
Source: GA4 utm_source=tiktok. TikTok does not pass UTMs reliably — estimate from link-in-bio clicks.
Source: GA4 utm_source=pinterest sessions. Pinterest analytics shows outbound clicks.
Source: Kit broadcast click rate x conversion rate. Use utm_campaign=phase2_launch filter in GA4.
Source: Kit newsletter click rate x conversion rate. Use utm_campaign=phase2_nurture filter in GA4.
Source: GA4 direct/none sessions. Includes organic Etsy search and bookmarked URLs.
Source: GA4 referral traffic not attributed to above channels. Check referral report for unlisted sources.
Review totals weekly. Revenue by channel helps identify highest-ROI content types.

UTM parameters in emails: utm_source=kit, utm_medium=email, utm_campaign=phase2_launch (broadcast) or phase2_nurture (newsletter). Social UTMs: add ?utm_source=[platform]&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=phase2_launch to all bio links.

column10: Execute Contingency Playbook Scenario 1: Low Conversion
Revenue below $200/day average — check order volume and pricing mix
Unsubscribe rate above 2% — review recent email content for misalignment

column8: Target: 12+ sign-ups by T+12h on May 30. Below 12 = monitor closely.
Target: 20-35 sign-ups total by T+38h. Below 20 = activate contingency review.
Target: 5-12 orders by T+12h. Below 5 = investigate conversion path.
Target: 10-20 orders by T+38h. Below 10 = AT RISK status (see Launch Day Operations Guide Part 4).
Target: 25%+ for launch broadcast. Below 20% = check inbox placement and sender authentication.
Target: 8%+ click rate on broadcast. Below 8% = review CTA copy and link placement.
Target: 20+ combined likes+comments across all platforms by T+12h. Below 20 = post manually if Buffer failed.
Hard bounce rate above 5% on any single send = stop sending and investigate. Contact Kit support.
Target: 100% of May 30-31 orders shipped by June 2. Below 100% = contact supplier immediately.

column11: Count total Etsy orders from May 30 through June 27.
Total Etsy revenue May 30 through June 27. Source: Etsy Shop Manager > Stats.

column3: All products at Dog level (under 5 orders)
column10: Star = top-selling product. Review Phase 1 view data. If one product has 2x the orders of others, that is your Star.
Count Kit interest tags. If seed-saver AND city-grower both exceed 20% of total sign-ups — cohort diversity passes.

column11: Repeat = same customer places 2+ orders within 30 days. Source: Etsy order history, match by buyer name/email.

column2: Less than 2% error rate (wrong product / fulfillment issue)
column11: Error rate = (number of orders with problems) / (total orders). Log problems in WORKLOG.md.

column6: GO: 5+ criteria pass — proceed to Phase 3 planning
column7: =IF(E9=4,CONDITIONAL: 4 criteria pass — delay 2 weeks and address failures"
column8: NO-GO: fewer than 4 criteria pass — do not launch Phase 3)))
column10: 5-of-6 pass = GO. 4 = conditional. Fewer than 4 = no-go.

column4: If total pass count is 4 or below after Week 4 (June 27), document the failing criteria in WORKLOG.md, identify root cause for each failure, and set a 2-week remediation deadline before re-evaluating.
